description: Tenant has a saved preference: screening rules belong in the system prompt, never in SOPs. Operator edit touches a screening rejection wording. Agent must consult the memory key and classify NO_FIX or SYSTEM_PROMPT — never SOP_CONTENT.
agentMessageDraft: Unfortunately we cannot accommodate this booking — our property does not allow visitor groups under your composition.
operatorEdited: Unfortunately we cannot accept this booking. Our property is families-only.

memorySnapshot.value: Screening workflow gaps map to SYSTEM_PROMPT on the screening variant, not SOP. The screening rules live in TenantAiConfig.systemPromptScreening; do NOT propose a new SOP for screening-related edits.
